title: pyrethrum macrotum
intro: Pyrethrum macrotum, also known as Large-flowered Pyrethrum, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is a perennial plant native to South America, with medicinal properties attributed to its flowers, leaves, and roots, which contain pyrethrins, a group of natural insecticides. The plant's medicinal properties are used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe and calm the body, as well as to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
